description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pipeline that runs on push to master, hotfix/*, and tags matching v*, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch with an optional force_release input. The workflow has three jobs: tests, asan, and release. The tests job runs on a matrix of OS, Python versions, and configurations, checking out the code, setting up Python, building, testing, and uploading build artifacts. The asan job runs on ubuntu-latest, building and testing with AddressSanitizer. The release job depends on tests and asan, downloading artifacts, setting up Python, installing twine, and uploading to PyPI if the workflow is triggered on a tag or with force_release enabled.
